name: Elite Limousine Svc
recent_news: No web presence found for Walkertown, NC entity at elitelimovip.com; that domain appears to belong to a Columbus, OH event/wedding limo service. Likely a very small livery operation; no evidence of school-district contracts.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Eight-employee limo/livery operator with no evidence of school-bus or SPED contracts; sub-scale for Summit tuck-in even if confirmed.

name: Legacy Limousine
recent_news: legacylimousineservice.com returned 404; the 7legacy.com brand is a separate Maryland operator. No public evidence of school-district or SPED contracts in Florham Park, NJ.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Six-employee livery operator; no school-bus footprint identified; far below Summit tuck-in scale.

name: Arcediano Inc
districts_or_customers: Austin-area corporate and school groups (charter/field-trip basis)
recent_news: Arcediano Inc operates as R&R Limousine & Bus; founded 2004 by Paul Arcediano originally as Rockin' Ride party bus, later expanded into corporate and school travel via R&R Limo & Bus brand.
fit_notes: Marginal fit. Charter/limo operator that touches school travel on a trip-charter basis, not a route-contract school-bus operator; sub-scale and wrong service model for Summit tuck-in.

name: Comfort Coach
recent_news: comfortcoach.com returned no usable content; no public record of school-district or SPED contracts in Murrieta, CA. Murrieta Valley USD lists separate transportation providers.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Five-employee operator with no verifiable school-bus footprint; sub-scale for Summit tuck-in.

name: Marina Limousine Svc
recent_news: marinalimo.com loads only a placeholder/loader; no evidence of school-district or SPED transportation in San Diego. Listed in CPUC carrier files as small livery permit holder.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Five-employee limo/livery operator; no school-bus or route SPED footprint; far below Summit tuck-in scale.
